overall_assessment: Found 3 HIGH and 2 MEDIUM/LOW issues. Path mismatch and producer-only problem verified.

findings.title: Path mismatch: _load_skill_frontmatter reads different path than _validate_skill_frontmatter
findings.description: _load_skill_frontmatter reads from P:/./claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md while _validate_skill_frontmatter reads from STATE_DIR/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md

evidence.proof: Two different functions read same SKILL.md from different paths

impact.business_consequence: Validation often runs against wrong path

findings.title: Producer-only: frontmatter_warnings written to ledger with no consumer
findings.description: set_skill_loaded writes frontmatter_warnings to ledger but no hook/router reads it back to surface to user

evidence.proof: Grep finds no consumer for frontmatter_warnings

findings.title: Success theater: 11 tests verify producer-side only
findings.description: Tests verify ledger write but not user output

evidence.proof: No test exercises consumer reading frontmatter_warnings

impact.business_consequence: CI passes but advisory system broken in production

recommendation.action: Add integration test verifying warnings appear in output

findings.title: CLAUDE.md absent from package
findings.description: premortem references P:/packages/skill-guard/CLAUDE.md but file does not exist

evidence.code_excerpt: Glob for CLAUDE.md returns no results

findings.title: Early-return gating may suppress warnings
findings.description: Condition at line 358-365 may suppress state writes

evidence.code_excerpt: if not frontmatter_warnings and not frontmatter: return

recommendation.action: Add test for skill with missing frontmatter and no required_tools

findings.title: EnforcementTierValidator unverified external claim
findings.description: EnforcementTierValidator referenced but not found in package
